full_text:
Chen Xiang (Zhonglin) йҷізҝ” (д»Ійәҹ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Xiang (йҷізҝ”), styledZhonglin (д»Ійәҹ), was born in Runan. One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia. From Runan. Chen Xiang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
